location: Random drop from spear-wielding Cleanrot Knights — most reliably the one guarding the entrance to the Prayer Room grace in Elphael, Brace of the Haligtree (spear-wielding Cleanrot Knights also appear in War-Dead Catacombs and Shaded Castle).
tactics: The Cleanrot Knight guarding Prayer Room respawns every time the area reloads, making it a repeatable farm target
Their charged spear thrust glows just before it fires — roll forward the instant it lights up, since it hits hard and can inflict scarlet rot
A stout shield lets you guard-counter their combos safely instead of trading hits
Don't mix this up with the sword-wielding Cleanrot Knight variant nearby — that one drops a different weapon entirely
lore: Carried by the Cleanrot Knights who fought at Malenia's side — its golden, wing-shaped blade strikes with holy force, and the small shield fixed near the tip is blessed to ward off rot.

builds.name: Faith quality holy poke
builds.why: Even D-scaling across Strength, Dexterity and Faith plus innate holy damage make it a straightforward Faith-quality pick, with its Sacred Phalanx skill throwing up a defensive wall of spears
